description: Generate an AI scientific schematic image (PNG) for a poster via OpenRouter (Nano Banana 2 image model + Gemini quality review with smart iterative refinement).
rules: writes a PNG + a JSON result manifest under record_store; mutates nothing else
requires OPENROUTER_API_KEY and network access to openrouter.ai
doc_type sets the quality threshold (poster=7.0); iterations capped at 2
degrades gracefully offline: emits schematic.json with outcome=skipped_offline_or_no_api_key and exits 0
usage: Set PROMPT (diagram description). Optional: OUTPUT_NAME (default schematic.png), DOC_TYPE (default poster). Provide OPENROUTER_API_KEY in env. Output: schematic.json (manifest) + the named PNG.
limitation: Needs OPENROUTER_API_KEY + network + the requests library; offline it produces only the manifest, not the image. doc-type is one of journal/conference/poster/presentation/report/grant/thesis/preprint/default.

vars.PROMPT: POSTER FORMAT for A0. ULTRA-SIMPLE 3-box workflow: DISCOVER -> VALIDATE -> APPROVE. 120pt bold. 60% white space.
